programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Orlando Magic face the Detroit Pistons for Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Little Caesars Arena. The Pistons enter the postseason as the No. 1 seed in the East (60-22). The teams split their four-game regular-season series 2-2.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round between the San Antonio Spurs and the Portland Trail Blazers takes place at Frost Bank Center. San Antonio won the regular-season series 2-1. Deni Avdija leads Portland with 24.2 points and 6.7 assists.

programme.title: NBC4 Postgame Live
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: NBC4 News
programme.desc: Breaking news, local stories, weather reports and events taking place in Southern California.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A college student goes missing in broad daylight from her off-campus job at a softball field; investigators receive a mysterious phone call that changes everything.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Open House
programme.desc: George returns to rescue a family for the second time.

programme.title: Meet the Press
programme.desc: Interviews with public figures and those making news, setting the political agenda and spotlighting the impact Washington decision-making has on Americans.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.desc: This early-morning news covers overnight events, breaking domestic and international news as well as a preview of the day's anticipated events. The program also presents regular reports from the worlds of business, entertainment and sports.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Knicks host the Hawks in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round series. New York leads 1-0 after a 113-102 win in Game 1. Jalen Brunson led the Knicks with 28 points, while Atlanta's CJ McCollum countered with a team-high 26 points.

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Nuggets host the Timberwolves in Game 2 of their Western Conference first-round series. Denver leads the series 1-0 following a 116-105 victory in the opener. Jamal Murray scored 30 points and Nikola Jokic recorded a triple-double in the win.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two decades after a Jacksonville, Fla., woman goes missing, her son solves the mystery that haunted his childhood.

programme.title: NBC4 News at 11pm

programme.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Lakers host the Rockets in Game 2 of their Western Conference first-round series. Los Angeles holds a 1-0 lead after winning the opener without Luka Doncic. Houston looks to even the series as Kevin Durant deals with a bruised right knee.

programme.desc: When two tragic deaths occur within one week of each other in a wealthy city in California, families begin to wonder what happened inside a beachfront mansion.
